description_long: A male security guard is depicted in a formal uniform, standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides. He wears a dark purple button-up shirt with a visible badge and shoulder patches, paired with black trousers and black shoes. The shirt is tucked in and complemented by a black tie, and a utility belt is fastened around his waist, holding various equipment. His facial expression is neutral, and his hair is neatly trimmed. The uniform is standardized, with insignia and a name tag on the chest, and the overall appearance is professional and authoritative. The figure's proportions and attire suggest readiness and alertness, suitable for urban security roles.
description: A male security guard in a formal dark uniform with a badge, utility belt, and arms extended horizontally, exuding professionalism and authority.
description_view_0: Front view showing the security guard's face, chest badge, name tag, and full uniform details with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the uniform, and the utility belt's outline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and trousers, with arms extended and no visible insignia.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the right arm, and the side of the utility belt.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal, standardized uniform consisting of a dark purple button-up shirt with a black tie, black trousers, and black shoes. The shirt features a visible badge and name tag on the chest, as well as shoulder patches. A black utility belt is worn around the waist, holding various equipment. The overall appearance is neat, professional, and suitable for urban security duties.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms fully extended horizontally to the sides, displaying a formal and alert demeanor.
